name: Bob Stewart
abstract: Bob Stewart (born February 3, 1945) is an American jazz tuba player and music teacher.

interviews.title: Bob Stewart interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 24, 2006

quotes.text: No. It comes from there and the tuba is the bass and the tuba — I went to a concert this brass band Gangbe — G-A-N-G-B-E — Gangbe, a brass band coming from Benin. And it was at Carnegie Hall after hours. And I got there a little late and I heard music coming out of the sound system coming down the escalator and I said why are they playing this Latin band on the Muzak while the band is on stage playing because the bass is going [scats]. I said why are they playing Latin music, and then going [claps rhythm]. And when I went in there it was this band playing and I got this huge Aha. Ahaaaa. They talk about the clave and it’s played in Latin music and everything but all that came from —
quotes.caption: Attending Gangbe Brass Band at Carnegie Hall
quotes.doc_title: Bob Stewart interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 24, 2006

about_quotes.speaker: Bley Carla
about_quotes.evidence: Michael Mantler. Bob Stewart. ... Vincent Chancey, he was even in my band ... Bob, no. John Clark, French Horn. ... [INTERVIEWER] ... was Bob Stewart on the tuba. [INTERVIEWEE] Oh!
about_quotes.doc_title: Bley Carla — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Ingrid Sertso
about_quotes.evidence: We worked with Bob Stewart in that big orchestra in Switzerland.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ingrid Sertso interviewed by Monk Rowe, Woodstock, New York, August 11, 2014

about_quotes.speaker: Red Callender
about_quotes.evidence: I'm mailing some things to Bob Stewart and Howard Johnson. That's for five tubas and alto saxophone, flugelhorn and trombone and keyboards. I think it's going to be performed on September 20th

about_quotes.speaker: Joseph Daley
about_quotes.evidence: Howard Johnson... passed it on to people like Bob Stewart, Dave Bargeron, Earl McIntyre, and a host of other people he passed this information on.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joseph Daley interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 18, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Howard Johnson
about_quotes.evidence: Bob Stewart and I had him come over to my loft one time and play some stuff for us.
about_quotes.doc_title: Howard Johnson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2019
